heading: Awards for contributions to Department of the Interior programs
label: 1473b Awards for contributions to Department of the Interior programs
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, in fiscal year 1992 and thereafter, any appropriations or funds available to the Department of the Interior in this Act may be used to provide nonmonetary awards of nominal value to private individuals and organizations that make contributions to Department of the Interior programs.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1992. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 102–154105 Stat. 990Nov. 13, 1991
